ordinary_user_journey: Open menu; choose a profile and startup preset; observe final status
Start full stack or app-only; verify only requested services and ownership
Restart owned stack; stop it; verify reused dispatcher is preserved
Run doctor once and inspect binary checks plus optional live probes
Select turbo, mono-perf or mono and verify resolved config
Compare configured profile, active model, dispatcher identity and UI

ordinary_user_journey: View active/local models and dispatcher state without downloading or deleting

ordinary_user_journey: Submit an ordinary question and receive a complete useful Russian answer
Request exact sentence, list, table, prose or JSON formats and validate deterministically
Reconstruct meta/delta/event/done and compare one non-duplicated GUI final
Run unambiguous, ambiguous and safe-default requests; verify question count and continuation

Reload history, revise prior answer and return to original goal
Run parallel conversations and verify no instruction or content mixing
Open the trace for a saved answer and verify it belongs to the selected message

Generate the same requested basename concurrently and preserve both outputs

ordinary_user_journey: Fetch an allowlisted public URL and show bounded result rather than a handoff

Verify final report answers the original goal and references real deliverables
